verse_text: He shall sanctify to the Lord the days of his vow, and bring a male lamb in its first year as a trespass offering; but the former days shall be null and void, because the head of his vow was defiled.

links.context: The vow Paul makes is likely a form of the Nazirite vow ([[NUM.6:1]]-21) given in thanksgiving for deliverance from danger.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
